ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the performance */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the performance took place */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the performance occurred */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the performance */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the performance (e.g., drama, comedy, musical) */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the performance in minutes */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the director of the performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the actor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the actor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the actor */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the actor */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the actor's agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actors_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency the agent represents */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the director */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the director */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the actor playing the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character in the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES performances ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_actors" (
  "performance_actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between performance and actor */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_actors_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES performances ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_actors_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance the note is associated with */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the note */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., rehearsal, performance, technical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_notes_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES performances ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_venues" (
  "performance_venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between performance and venue */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_venues_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES performances ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_venues_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_success" (
  "success_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each success record */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance */,
  "reception" TEXT /* General reception of the production */,
  "box_office" REAL /* Box office earnings for the production */,
  "audience_size" INTEGER /* Average audience size for the production */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("success_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_success_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES performances ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "review_content" TEXT /* Content of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the reviewer (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES performances ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "is_winner" INTEGER /* Whether the production won the award (true) or was nominated (false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES performances ("performance_id")
)
